decisions.decision: Generalize beyond Yellow Brick Cinema to a per-station opt-in flag (default OFF), YouTube-scoped
decisions.rationale: Cafe BGM and other channels have the same live-stream URL-churn problem; YBC is just the motivating case

decisions.decision: Always-manual mapping in a provider-level review/resolve dialog with drop/replace/add actions, editable per-row names, conservative review-and-confirm apply
decisions.rationale: Old streams can vanish and be replaced by unrelated new ones with no title connection; user wants explicit control and no accidental deletes (D-05..D-10)

decisions.decision: Provider-row sidebar context menu is the trigger (Claude's discretion); flag + hidden YouTube-title anchor stored on station
decisions.rationale: Display name is user-customizable so cannot be the match key; anchor only pre-orders dialog suggestions (D-03, D-04)

decisions.decision: Deferred to v3: pluggable, custom-site-aware live-URL resolver (Twitch + arbitrary sites), config-driven
decisions.rationale: No HTTP-stream visibility for Twitch/others without a plugin process; out of scope for YouTube-only Phase 96

next_action: Re-run /gsd:plan-phase 96 --auto (or /gsd:plan-phase 96). It auto-loads 96-CONTEXT.md and runs research -> plan -> verify. Because workflow._auto_chain_active=true, it will then auto-advance into execute-phase. The researcher had NOT started, so there is no partial RESEARCH.md to reconcile.
